summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 new tasks: FAQ CRUD backend, ContactInfo youtube/whatsapp fields, Contact page dynamic FAQ, lightbox responsiveness, Değer Artışı chart removal, Admin FAQ+Social UI, mobile menu scroll-lock/z-index. All 5 tasks pass. Backend: 10/10 new tests pass. Frontend: all UI flows verified on desktop + mobile.

backend.test_faq_list_seeded: PASS - 3 default FAQs seeded & returned with id/question/answer/color/sort_order/is_active
backend.test_faq_create_update_delete: PASS - full CRUD + GET persistence verified

frontend_desktop_1920x1080.contact_page_dynamic_faq: PASS - all 3 default FAQ questions rendered on /iletisim
frontend_desktop_1920x1080.admin_faq_page: PASS - 3 default FAQs rendered with amber/blue/green left borders; add/edit/delete/toggle buttons visible
frontend_desktop_1920x1080.admin_sidebar_sss_link: PASS - 'SSS' item with HelpCircle icon present
frontend_desktop_1920x1080.admin_content_social_fields: PASS - YouTube URL + WhatsApp URL inputs present in İletişim sub-tab (alongside Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn/Twitter)
frontend_desktop_1920x1080.project_detail_lightbox: PASS - lightbox image has classes 'max-w-full max-h-[80vh] w-auto h-auto object-contain'; rendered at 711x864 in 1920x1080 viewport (within bounds)

frontend_mobile_390x844.menu_opaque_white_bg: PASS - bg rgb(255,255,255), z-index 55, full viewport minus top-20
frontend_mobile_390x844.menu_z_index_correct: PASS - overlay z-55 (navbar z-60 above, WhatsApp z-50 below)
frontend_mobile_390x844.mobile_menu_shows_social_icons: PASS - Instagram CTA + Facebook, YouTube, LinkedIn, Twitter icons rendered dynamically
frontend_mobile_390x844.nav_grid_present: PASS - Ana Sayfa / Hakkımda / Projeler / Güncel İlanlar / Değer Artışı / Hesaplama / Blog / İletişim

critical_code_review_comments: Admin Content 'social media tab' is actually placed inside the İletişim tab (not a separate 'Sosyal Medya' tab as review_request described). Fields are correctly present, so this is just a description mismatch — consider renaming for clarity if a dedicated tab is desired.

FAQ list endpoint uses count==0 as a seed trigger; if admin deletes all FAQs and list endpoint is hit, defaults re-seed. Acceptable but worth documenting — main agent may want a separate one-time seed flag in site_settings to prevent accidental re-seeding.
Minor: faq_routes.update_faq strips None on input but returns full doc (good). Consider excluding '_id' explicitly (currently handled via projection {_id:0}) — OK as implemented.
seed_data_creation: None left behind. Test FAQ was created then deleted within the same test. Contact info youtube/whatsapp fields were set to test URLs (https://youtube.com/@testchannel, https://wa.me/905551112233) — main agent may want to clear these or set to production values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 tasks verified end-to-end. Contact info currently holds test values for youtube/whatsapp that admin can overwrite. FAQ default seed creates 3 items if collection empty (Danışmanlık/Bölge/Yatırım). Mobile menu scroll-lock uses document.body.style.overflow and z-index stack is navbar(60) > overlay(55) > whatsapp(50). Lightbox image uses max-h-[80vh] max-w-full object-contain. Değer Artışı comparison-line-chart testid was removed; comparison-table remains.
